description: Uses `tool=post_extractor` in extraction code example; correct key is `toolType` as documented by every other skill in the repo

description: Command file declares no `allowed-tools`; needs at least `xquik` and `explore` MCP tools
Command has at least four sequential steps (confirm, check account, post, show result) but none are numbered
suggested_fix: Rewrite body as a numbered list: 1. Confirm... 2. Resolve account... 3. POST /tweets... 4. Show result...

description: Command file declares no `allowed-tools`; needs `xquik` MCP tool
Command file declares no `allowed-tools`; needs `xquik` MCP tool
Command file declares no `allowed-tools`; needs `xquik` MCP tool
Example uses `?limit=50&sort=top` on GET /x/users/{id}/tweets; user-tweets SKILL.md explicitly states `limit` and `sort` are not supported by this endpoint
suggested_fix: Remove `limit=50&sort=top` from the example URL; use cursor-based pagination and client-side sort as documented in user-tweets

description: Endpoint row shows `GET /x/tweets/search?sort=top&min_faves=5000`; the sort mode parameter is `queryType=Top`, not `sort=top`
MCP config routes all tool calls through external server https://xquik.com/mcp via streamable-http; API key injected per user config
fp_reason: The external MCP server connection is the documented, intended mechanism of this plugin — it is a thin protocol adapter over the same first-party REST API; there is no unexpected exfiltration surface
rule_gap: Rule should distinguish intentional first-party MCP adapters from unexpected third-party network calls based on whether the target URL matches the plugin's declared API endpoint

description: devDependency `@tanstack/intent` pinned to `"latest"` — resolves to a moving target on each install, creating a supply-chain risk for package maintainers
suggested_fix: Pin to a specific semver version (e.g., `"1.0.0"`) in package.json

description: `prepublishOnly` lifecycle script runs `node scripts/check-versions.mjs`; script is a read-only version-drift checker with no network calls or shell exec
fp_reason: The script only reads local files and compares version strings; it runs exclusively on `npm publish` by the maintainer, not on user install; no code execution risk to end users
rule_gap: Rule should distinguish prepublishOnly (maintainer-only publish gate) from postinstall (runs on user npm install); the risk profiles are entirely different

description: Uses `tool=post_extractor` while every other skill in the repo uses `toolType`; contradicts user-tweets, extract-followers, who-retweeted, and all other extraction skills
suggested_fix: Align parameter key to `toolType` to match the canonical pattern across the repo

description: Endpoint table shows `sort=top` for search endpoint; search-tweets SKILL.md documents the correct parameter as `queryType=Top`
suggested_fix: Update the endpoint row to use `queryType=Top` and move engagement floor into the `q` parameter: `q=min_faves:5000&queryType=Top`
